case_title: NAY ORTILA HERRERA VS. SANTANDER INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-15-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SANTANDER INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-15-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT STANDER CAPITAL GROUP INC.

DECLARATION OF OF PLAINTIFF RE:AMENDED CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF HERRERA, NAY ORTILA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-03-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-03-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT SANTANDER INC. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO SANTANDER INC. BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF AUG-03-2015 AT 1:30 PM.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,674.00 FILED BY HERRERA, NAY ORTILA AS TO DEFENDANT SANTANDER INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-29-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HERRERA, NAY ORTILA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STANDER CAPITAL GROUP INC. $6,674.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,779.00, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST SANTANDER, INC. IS DISMISSED AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-29-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-03-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "PLAINTIFF WANTS TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO NAME THE PROPER DEFENDANT", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF MUST SERVE THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO THE NEXT HEARING DATE WITH THE AMENDED CLAIM. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,674.00 FILED BY HERRERA, NAY ORTILA AS TO DEFENDANT SANTANDER INC. STANDER CAPITAL GROUP INC.
